query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_reviews,
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NULL OR userId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guest_reviews,
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL AND userId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as registered_reviews
FROM reviews;

  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NULL OR userId = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guest_reviews,
  SUM(CASE WHEN userId IS NOT NULL AND userId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as registered_reviews
FROM reviews;
